The '''''Battle of Hoth'' Scenario Pack''' is a scenario expansion set for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] Game, produced by [[Wizards of the Coast]]. It was released in December 2007. It was announced at [[Celebration IV]]. It is a Target exclusive.

The set includes:
*17 miniatures including:
**Holographic [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Veers]]
**[[Blizzard Scout 1]]
**Various [[Cold assault stormtrooper|Snowtroopers]]
**Various [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Hoth Troopers]]
**A [[Snowspeeder/Legends|Snowspeeder]]
**[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Commander
**[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on [[Tauntaun/Legends|Tauntaun]]
**[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on Tauntaun
**[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], Hoth Commander
